reason: Confirmed identity (Article 3 Recognition, Article 2 Definitions, Article 23 Term) as a genuine, complete meet-and-confer agreement between the City of Austin and the Austin EMS Association, single-occupation EMS/paramedic bargaining unit (civilians explicitly excluded), on the same official austintexas.gov/labor-relations page family as the already-ingested Austin police and fire agreements.
caveat: EMS is civil-service-protected and statutorily adjacent to police/fire (shared Ch.143 Civil Service Commission; bargains under Ch.142 Subchapter D, the same chapter as Austin police) -- flagged so it is never described as an ordinary civilian/clerical comparison unit in later report language. occupation_class=nurse_health is final (no recognition-clause-first bundling ambiguity).
